<!--
  Please give your pull request a descriptive name! We don't want to be guessing on what you are adding and/or changing.

  Examples of a good Pull Request Title:
  - feat: Add new wine module manager
  - fix: resolve race condition in sample_function()
  - chore: update tauri-plugin-notification to latest

  Examples of a bad PR title:
  - update packages
  - fix bugs
  - update configs
-->

## Pull Request Type

- [ ] Bug Fix
  - [ ] Security Vulnerability
- [ ] Feature
  - [ ] TypeScript Feature
  - [ ] Rust Feature
- [ ] Configuration Change
- [ ] Package Updates
- [ ] Other

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] This pull request contains breaking changes
<!--What feature(s) does your pull request break?-->

## Checklist

- [ ] There are no active pull requests that are similar to my changes
- [ ] I am not breaking any features unintentionally or without a good reason to do so
<!-- The Elysiae Project considers "vibe-coded" to mean code completely generated by AI with loose directives, not AI-assisted code or code generated by AI with detailed directives -->
- [ ] My work is not vibe-coded AI slop
